resources.string: Would you like to know more?
You can enable this option if you are hosting Jupyter yourself and run it with the --expose-app-in-browser option. \n
In other cases, it is highly recommended to leave the option disabled and also add keyboard shortcuts for Show Left Activity Bar and Show Right Activity Bar menu items. \n
To do this, go to Settings Editor > JSON Settings Editor > Keyboard Shortcuts and insert the following code to the User Preferences field.
